text: Step 5: integrate modal into graph drag triggers
description: useGraphInteraction.ts: drop-on-existing-node (:469) and drag-to-create-new-aim (:253). Connect with defaultWeight first (preserve radius/relPos correction at :258-276 for the create case), then open ConnectionDetailsModal for {parent, child}. Cancel keeps the default link.

status.comment: useGraphInteraction.ts: after connect on drop-on-existing (:469) and drag-to-create (:253, post relPos correction), opens ConnectionDetailsModal(parentId, childId). vue-tsc clean.
